title: streptanthus glandulosus subsp. secundus
intro: Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. secundus is a subspecies of the plant commonly known as Sand Alyssum, a member of the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sand Alyssum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Traditional herbal preparations of Streptanthus glandulosus subsp. secundus include teas, infusions, and salves made from its leaves and roots.
